findings.evidence: assigned_analyst_count=134 (>100 = MAJOR; >50 = MODERATE). Down from 151 prior run (-11%) and from 165 two runs ago (-19%). Net velocity 7d strongly positive (+124). Trend direction is GREEN (closing) but absolute level still over MAJOR threshold. age_ge_14d_count=73 (sticky middle-aged backlog; was 78 last run, drift -6%). open_issues_total trajectory 4-run window: 175 → 161 → 160 → 143 (decreasing 18% in ~24h).
findings.interpretation: Closure machinery (decider M2 burndown + new auto-closures) is actively draining; assigned-analyst is finally moving. PROP-034 Phase 1 (analyst-baby) is the lever for further drainage of the orphan-pre-PROP-029 backlog. No new escalation needed; trajectory healthy.

Composition: 560MB FUSE workspace (mostly monitor/integrity bloat — see prior finding) + 450MB /tmp/edit-clone (operator working clone, mtime 4h, NOT eligible for tinker cleanup per the <24h policy). 0 actionable removals this run. System root partition at 98% with 291MB free; system baseline ~8.5GB is immutable per CLAUDE.md two-repo-architecture note. /tmp/dome-poll-1778583964 (412KB, 2 days old, NOT in /tmp/*-clone glob — out of empowerment scope).

workspace-sync agent_notes across 2026-05-13 runs report Mech1 still_pending=5 with stable IDs ISS-1944, ISS-1945, ISS-1958, ISS-1964, ISS-1977 across at least 10+ consecutive runs. Pattern: their verification_pattern is failing to confirm the fix even though the fix landed. Standing pattern noted by workspace-sync itself.
findings.interpretation: Not actionable as Mode 2; needs decider or operator triage to either (a) update the verification_pattern, (b) reclassify these as terminal, or (c) write a Mech1-bypass for legacy entries. Flagging for next non-Mode-2 tinker run or for decider attention via human-note (not raised this run).

findings.evidence: Mech 3 audit reports uncited=3296→3304 and bogus_anchors=48 across 10+ consecutive workspace-sync runs. One agent_notes hint: 'likely parse artifact given scale.' The metric is constant within noise, suggesting it has saturated and is no longer actionable as a delta signal.
findings.interpretation: Either (a) the audit-narrative-citations.js definition of 'uncited paragraph' is over-inclusive (e.g., counts every prose paragraph that lacks a fragment-anchor as uncited even when no anchor would be appropriate), OR (b) there's a real corpus of 3300+ uncited paragraphs no one has cited because the cite-everywhere policy isn't being enforced post-rollout. Either way the soft-complaint isn't generating action — could either be silenced (define a baseline + report only deltas) or escalated to operator. Flagging for operator review; not raised as PROP this run.

findings.evidence: Tinker.md Pre-flight Backlog-Trend Computation pseudocode references o.ts for closure-ledger filtering. Actual closure-ledger.jsonl entries use closed_at (sample: '"closed_at":"2026-05-13T21:21:51Z"'). The pseudocode is illustrative ('see PROP-030 metrics_specification for exact code') but consumers copying the snippet verbatim will undercount. Caught and corrected in this run; recommend PROP-030 metrics_specification clarification or tinker.md inline-comment fix.
findings.interpretation: Low-blast: the canonical implementation might already use closed_at and the inline pseudocode is just a sketch. Verify next Mode 3 run; if real, file a small prompt fix.
